title: First Amy Bell Scholarship recipient graduates
description: CRADOCK NEWS - Just eight years ago,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - Just eight years ago, Charneen Syster was one of the first Amy Bell Scholarship recipients.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - Just eight years ago, Charneen Syster was one of the first Amy Bell Scholarship recipients."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"She becomes our first graduate from that very same group,\" says Irvin Tam, director of Amy Bell Charities in Cradock, during an interview with the Graaff-Reinet Advertiser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"From her early days at Carinus Primary to walking through the halls of Cradock High School, and watching her grow into a young woman and graduating with a bachelor’s degree in psychology from Nelson Mandela University is one of the most beautiful reminders of the power of upliftment through education.","html":"\"From her early days at Carinus Primary to walking through the halls of Cradock High School, and watching her grow into a young woman and graduating with a bachelor’s degree in psychology from Nelson Mandela University is one of the most beautiful reminders of the power of upliftment through education."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are filled with pride as we celebrate this incredible achievement.\"","html":"We are filled with pride as we celebrate this incredible achievement.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Amy Bell Charities remains deeply rooted in honouring its mission.","html":"Amy Bell Charities remains deeply rooted in honouring its mission."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As a wildlife foundation, it is incredibly grateful to the hunters, taxidermists, game ranchers and all their nature-loving friends for continued and generous support.","html":"As a wildlife foundation, it is incredibly grateful to the hunters, taxidermists, game ranchers and all their nature-loving friends for continued and generous support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Amy Bell Charities wishes to continue to empower and equip young minds to grow into their fullest potential.","html":"Amy Bell Charities wishes to continue to empower and equip young minds to grow into their fullest potential."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: First Amy Bell Scholarship recipient graduates
